ActiveXComponentProperty.Properties: <chart paletteColors="368ac0,efa836" plotFillAngle="0" plotFillRatio="100" plotFillAlpha="98" plotGradientColor="666666" baseFont="Arial" />
<chart paletteColors="368ac0, efa836,76b051,9279a6" plotFillAngle="0" plotFillRatio="100" plotFillAlpha="98" plotGradientColor="666666" baseFont="Arial" />

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLItems.GetItemParSp( PARMS(RVAR V(ApsParmApsmode), VAR , VAR , VAR , VAR , VAR , VAR , VAR , MESSAGE, VAR V(Parm_Site)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Description: chanhes unit cost label based on cost type

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR ItemWarehouses, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

Variable.Name: cds_graph1
Variable.Value: graph.object( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(QtyOnHand, QtyReorder) DATASERIESCOLORS(0,128,255|0,255,128) LEGENDS(sWarehouse On Hand, sSafetyStock) DEFAULTTYPE(80) DEFAULTXLIMIT(1) LEGENDPOS(1) YAXISTITLEORIENTATION(0) YMIN(0) YMAX(0) WIDGETVERTICAL(False) LAYOUTTYPE(10) LEGENDBORDERBOX(False) LEGENDHORIZONTAL(False) GRAPHBORDERBOX(False) NOXAXISLABEL(True) LEGENDAUTOTEXTCOLOR(False) LEGENDBOXMODE(1) LOCKOBJ(False) RUNTIMEBUTTONS(True) RUNTIMEPROPERTIES(True) LAYOUTGRIDWIDTH(60) LAYOUTGRIDHEIGHT(100) LAYO
Variable.Value2: UTGRIDX(5) LAYOUTGRIDY(5) LAYOUTGRIDANCHOR(0) LAYOUTTITLEWIDTH(0) LAYOUTTITLEHEIGHT(0) LAYOUTTITLEX(0) LAYOUTTITLEY(0) LAYOUTTITLEANCHOR(0) LAYOUTLEGENDWIDTH(40) LAYOUTLEGENDHEIGHT(25) LAYOUTLEGENDX(62) LAYOUTLEGENDY(15) LAYOUTLEGENDANCHOR(0) LAYOUTGRIDTOPMARGIN(10) LAYOUTGRIDBOTTOMMARGIN(35) LAYOUTGRIDLEFTMARGIN(75) LAYOUTGRIDRIGHTMARGIN(10) LAYOUTLEGENDTOPMARGIN(0) LAYOUTLEGENDBOTTOMMARGIN(0) LAYOUTLEGENDLEFTMARGIN(0) LAYOUTLEGENDRIGHTMARGIN(0))

Variable.Name: cds_graph2
Variable.Value: graph.object( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(QtyPurYtd, QtySoldYtd, TrnInYtd, TrnOutYtd) DATASERIESCOLORS(0,128,255|0,255,128|255,255,0|255,128,128) LEGENDS(sPurchased YTD, sSold YTD, sTransferred In YTD, sTransfered Out YTD) DEFAULTTYPE(80) DEFAULTXLIMIT(1) LEGENDPOS(1) YAXISTITLEORIENTATION(0) YMIN(0) YMAX(0) WIDGETVERTICAL(False) LAYOUTTYPE(10) LEGENDBORDERBOX(False) LEGENDHORIZONTAL(False) GRAPHBORDERBOX(False) NOXAXISLABEL(True) LEGENDAUTOTEXTCOLOR(False) LEGENDBOXMODE(1) LOCKOBJ(False) RUNTIMEBUTTON
Variable.Value2: S(True) RUNTIMEPROPERTIES(True) LAYOUTGRIDWIDTH(60) LAYOUTGRIDHEIGHT(100) LAYOUTGRIDX(5) LAYOUTGRIDY(5) LAYOUTGRIDANCHOR(0) LAYOUTTITLEWIDTH(0) LAYOUTTITLEHEIGHT(0) LAYOUTTITLEX(0) LAYOUTTITLEY(0) LAYOUTTITLEANCHOR(0) LAYOUTLEGENDWIDTH(40) LAYOUTLEGENDHEIGHT(50) LAYOUTLEGENDX(62) LAYOUTLEGENDY(15) LAYOUTLEGENDANCHOR(0) LAYOUTGRIDTOPMARGIN(10) LAYOUTGRIDBOTTOMMARGIN(35) LAYOUTGRIDLEFTMARGIN(75) LAYOUTGRIDRIGHTMARGIN(10) LAYOUTLEGENDTOPMARGIN(0) LAYOUTLEGENDBOTTOMMARGIN(0) LAYOUTLEGENDLEFTMARGIN(0

Variable.Name: cds_QtyReorderGraph
Variable.Value: chart.object( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(QtyOnHand, QtyReorder) LEGENDS(sWarehouseOnHand, sSafetyStock) RENDERASLIST(, ) CHARTSTYLE(Multi-Series Charts) CHARTTYPE(MSColumn2D) CHARTBINDTOCURRENTROW(1))

Variable.Name: cds_QtyTurnOverGraph
Variable.Value: chart.object( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(QtyPurYtd, QtySoldYtd, TrnInYtd, TrnOutYtd) LEGENDS(sPurchasedYTD, sSoldYTD, sTransferredInYTD, sTransferredOutYTD) RENDERASLIST(, , , ) CHARTSTYLE(Multi-Series Charts) CHARTTYPE(MSColumn2D) CHARTBINDTOCURRENTROW(1))

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: If (sIsRS7786_3ActiveVar = "1" And currentWhse <> "" And currentItem <> "") Then
'Current Purchase Overhead is greater than 0 for Item that [Item: <item.item>],
'Source is Purchased and will be <new value for source> for Item that has [Item: <item.item>].
